parsed.reason: All seven candidates are genuinely local, age- and interest-appropriate, and presented with honest calibration. BYSA is the flagship recreational soccer provider in Burnaby with verifiable programs; Parks & Rec drop-ins and after-school sports are documented standard offerings; Burnaby FC and other clubs are realistic progression options. Burnaby Lake and Central Park are real public spaces with confirmed amenities suitable for informal soccer play. Swangard Stadium is appropriately pitched as plausible ("occasional" youth events, not guaranteed specifics) with a source. No fabricated class times, instructors, or prices. Confidence levels (0.62–0.88) are calibrated to the certainty of the claims—highest for park access and established programs, lower for occasional events. This reflects how a knowledgeable local parent would actually talk about options: verified institutions with appropriate caveats to check details yourself.
